# GitHub Copilot instructions

This repository's contributor and agent guidance lives in
[AGENTS.md](../AGENTS.md). Read it first — it covers repo structure, build and
test commands, coding style, and the detailed rules under
[`.agents/rules/`](../.agents/rules/).

## Agent skills

Reusable task skills live in [`.agents/skills/`](../.agents/skills/), each as a
`SKILL.md` with `name`/`description` frontmatter that Copilot matches against
your request. Copilot reads this directory directly. Available skills include
`gas-benchmark`, `review`, `resource-leak-audit`, and `fix-nethtest`.

Edit skills only in `.agents/skills/`; the copies under `.claude/skills/` and
`.cursor/skills/` are generated by `scripts/sync-skills.sh`. See
[`.agents/rules/agent-skills.md`](../.agents/rules/agent-skills.md).
